summary: Backend-only E2E test suite for Famrak. Created /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering AUTH (register/login/me), FAMILY (create/join/members/access-control), LOCATION (update/family/history/haversine/geofence), PLACES (CRUD), CHAT (send/list/order), CHECK-IN, SOS (create/active/resolve) and WEBSOCKET (/api/ws token auth + hello + real-time broadcast of message/location events + family isolation). 35/35 tests passing against the public preview URL.

minor.issue: When no Authorization header is sent HTTPBearer(auto_error=False) + our explicit check returns 401, but FastAPI docs would expect 403 in some libraries. Behavior is fine, just noting inconsistency.

action_items: Optional: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan handler.
Optional: consider adding a POST /api/auth/logout or explicit token revocation for future security features (JWT is stateless today, 30-day expiry).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~700 lines and contains AUTH, FAMILY, LOCATION, PLACES, CHAT, CHECK-IN, SOS and WS all in a single module. If it grows further, split into routers/*.py and services/* for maintainability.
@app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in modern FastAPI; use lifespan context manager.
manager.broadcast() catches all exceptions silently; consider logging so dropped WS clients are observable.
WebSocket does not remove disconnected connections proactively (only on receive loop). Dead sockets may linger inside rooms; broadcast will silently swallow errors. Acceptable for MVP.
gen_invite_code() alphabet mutation lines are order-sensitive but correct; consider defining constant outside function.
Access control is enforced correctly for /location/history/{id} (403 for non-family). Other endpoints scope by user['family_id']. Good.
seed_data_creation: 3 test users created per pytest run with prefix 'TEST_' at domain '@famrak-test.example.com'. One family per run named 'TEST Family <run_id>'. All data persists in famrak_db (users, families, locations, location_history, places, geofence_state, messages, checkins, sos_alerts).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public base URL: https://2f0b134a-c115-4c23-831f-cd32c188338c.preview.emergentagent.com. WS path: /api/ws?token=<jwt>. All endpoints /api/*. Note that pydantic EmailStr rejects '.test' and other reserved TLDs — use '.example.com'. Server lowercases email on register/login so tests compare against email.lower(). WebSocket handshake close from server (1008) surfaces as HTTP 403 in websockets client; tests accept both 'closed_1008' and 'invalid_status_403'. Test file is idempotent (uses uuid RUN_ID per run) and self-cleaning is not implemented (safe: TEST_ prefix + example.com domain). To re-run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v
rca_of_issue: N/A - no bugs found in backend.
